test_cases.description: User submits artifact with self-assessment, review produces evidence-cited feedback
test_cases.input: User submits analytical report with self-score 3/5. Report contains: revenue claim with ERP source, 2 assumptions stated, recommendation with owner.
test_cases.expected_output: Review report with D1 score 3/5 citing ERP source passage, D2 score with logic assessment, D3 score with action clarity check. Self-assessment delta calculated. 1 priority action identified.
test_cases.pass_criteria: Every score cites specific artifact passage (not generic). Self-assessment delta present. Exactly 1 top priority action. No examiner language used.

test_cases.input: User says: 'Review giúp tôi cái này' and attaches artifact, without providing self-score.
test_cases.expected_output: HALT. Response: 'Bạn tự chấm artifact này bao nhiêu điểm (1-5) và tại sao?' No review delivered until self-assessment provided.
test_cases.pass_criteria: No review report generated. Self-assessment prompt delivered. No scores calculated.
